name: Potato-Ham Scallop
recipeInstructions:
1. Place half the ham in a 2-quart casserole.
2. Cover with half the potatoes and half the onion.
3. Sift half the flour over; season with salt and pepper.
4. Repeat layering of ham, potatoes, and onion.
5. Season with additional salt and pepper.
6. Sift remaining flour atop.
7. Pour milk over all.
8. Bake covered at 350° for 1 to 1 1/4 hours until the potatoes are nearly tender.
9. Uncover.
10. Combine bread crumbs and melted butter; sprinkle atop casserole.
11. Top with parsley.
12. Bake for an additional 15 minutes.
